title: Protocols
summary: 9618 A Level — TCP/IP, HTTP, FTP, and protocol layers for network communication.

simpleExplanation.title: Rules for communication
simpleExplanation.summary: Protocols define message format and handshake rules. TCP is reliable; UDP is faster but connectionless.
steps: HTTP: client request, server response, status codes.

sections.content: **Protocols** (14.1) builds on AS **2.1** networks. Compare **TCP vs UDP** in a table for full marks.
